label: novel-no-playbook
ground_truth_notes: No prior incidents like this. The defender will probably reach for benign explanations (admin testing, supply-chain library phoning home). The critic should attack the strongest one with an observable test, OR concede that the worry is real but the test is unrunnable here (ESCALATE). Either is acceptable; CONCEDE is the failure.
